Call ID: EXT-014
Type: external
Date: 2026-04-27
Topic: Churn Risk & Escalation
Participants: Priya (account manager); Owen (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Priya): Hi Owen, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Owen): The outages last quarter really shook our confidence.
AM (Priya): Let me get you a firm commitment on the compliance roadmap.
Customer (Owen): Numbers matter to us — show me the impact.
AM (Priya): I hear you, and I want to make this right — let's build a plan.
Customer (Owen): I appreciate the candor, but we'll need to see real change fast.
AM (Priya): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
